Title: Detective Conan: Black Iron Submarine
Writer: Gôshô Aoyama, Jun'ichi Iioka, Takeharu Sakurai
Actors: Minami Takayama, Megumi Hayashibara, Rikiya Koyama
Plot: After the Black Organization kidnaps his friend Ai Haibara, Detective Conan is forced to rescue her on a mysterious submarine while uncovering the organization's secrets within the confined space.
